name: Dr. Javed Iqbal
biography: Dr. Javed Iqbal is a dermatologist with 30 years of clinical experience and the owner of Amna Murad Hospital.

name: Dr. Shazal Nazir
biography: Experienced physiotherapist and chiropractor specializing in orthopedic rehabilitation, spinal disorders, musculoskeletal pain management, sports injuries, and post-surgical rehabilitation.

name: Dr. Sana Fatima
biography: Dr. Sana is a dedicated Gynecologist, Obstetrician, and Infertility Specialist committed to providing compassionate, evidence-based care for women. She specializes in pregnancy care, gynecological disorders, infertility evaluation and treatment, family planning, and women's reproductive health. Her goal is to help women achieve optimal health and fulfill their dream of parenthood through personalized, patient-centered care.

name: Dr. Hafsa Ejaz
biography: Consultant General and Breast Surgeon with 10 years of experience in general and emergency surgical procedures.

name: Dr. Laiba Khalid
biography: Dr. Laiba Khalid is a qualified physiotherapist with four years of clinical experience. She specializes in the assessment and treatment of musculoskeletal conditions and sports-related injuries. She has previously served at Ashraf Hospital, published research in an international sports journal, and has three years of teaching experience at Royal Medical College and Riphah International University. She currently serves as the Head of Department (HOD) at Royal Medical College while providing patient-centered physiotherapy care.

name: Dr. Aimen Anjum
biography: Dr. Aimen Anjum is a Dental Surgeon with six years of clinical experience in both public and private healthcare sectors. She previously served as a Dental Surgeon at Children's Hospital Lahore and Allied Hospital Faisalabad. She has extensive experience treating both children and adults and is committed to providing high-quality, patient-centered dental care. Special attention is given to ensuring privacy and comfort for female patients, particularly those observing hijab. She currently runs her own clinical practice, Aimen's Dental Care, at Amna Murad Hospital, Satellite Town, Gujranwala.

name: Dr. Abdul Rahim
biography: Dr. Abdul Rahim is a qualified dental surgeon providing general dentistry, dental surgery, and oral healthcare services.

name: Dr. Israr Saeed Ghuman
biography: Dr. Israr Saeed Ghuman is a general and laparoscopic surgeon providing surgical consultation and minimally invasive surgical care at Amna Murad Hospital.

name: Ameera Saeed
biography: Ameera Saeed, BS-HND, MBA-HHCM, is a Clinical Dietitian specializing in child nutrition, weight management, maternal health, and therapeutic diets. She holds international certifications from Stanford University, Emory University, the University of Copenhagen, and Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich, reflecting her commitment to evidence-based nutrition and patient-centered care.
